# dwiforge — Python requirements
# Generated: 2026-04-04
# Update this file as new stages are implemented.
#
# Install:
#   pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# For GPU support, install PyTorch separately with the correct CUDA index:
#   pip install torch --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu123
#
# Sections:
#   CONFIRMED — used in implemented code
#   OPTIONAL  — improves functionality, pipeline runs without it
#   PENDING   — will be required; install now to avoid surprises

# ============================================================
# CONFIRMED — core data I/O and numerics
# ============================================================
numpy>=1.24
nibabel>=5.0
scipy>=1.10
scikit-learn>=1.3
tqdm>=4.65

# TOML parsing (not needed on Python >= 3.11 — tomllib is stdlib)
tomli>=2.0; python_version < "3.11"

# ============================================================
# CONFIRMED — denoising
# ============================================================
# IMPORTANT: 1.12.0 minimum — P2S v3 bug fixed in 1.12 (PR #3631)
# Versions 1.10.x and 1.11.x have a confirmed denoised-volume bug.
dipy>=1.12.0

# ============================================================
# OPTIONAL — full-mode dense displacement registration
# Falls back to scipy rigid registration if absent.
# Install with CUDA support separately (see header note).
# ============================================================
# torch>=2.0

# ============================================================
# PENDING — NODDI fitting (stage 05_noddi.sh)
# ============================================================
# dmri-amico>=2.0

# ============================================================
# CONFIRMED — ANTs Python bindings (installed by DESIGNER)
# ============================================================
# antspyx==0.4.2 is installed as a DESIGNER dependency.
# Do NOT install separately — version is pinned by DESIGNER.
# antspyx>=0.4

# ============================================================
# NOTE — DESIGNER-v2 installs separately into user site-packages
# ============================================================
# pip install git+https://github.com/NYU-DiffusionMRI/DESIGNER-v2.git
#
# DESIGNER pins dipy==1.9.0 which conflicts with our dipy>=1.12.0.
# Install dwiforge requirements into a virtualenv BEFORE installing DESIGNER,
# or into a separate virtualenv from DESIGNER's user site-packages.
#
# DESIGNER dependencies (managed by DESIGNER, do not add here):
#   designer2==2.0.15, dipy==1.9.0, antspyx==0.4.2, nibabel==5.2.1,
#   numpy==1.26.4, scipy==1.13.1, scikit-learn==1.5.0, PyYAML==6.0.1

# ============================================================
# OPTIONAL — DIPY visualisation (QC report stage)
# ============================================================
# fury>=0.10
matplotlib>=3.7
